steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase solitary artist describes the understanding that the discovery of a student under de Hooch's tutelage would directly contradict.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Negating means to contradict or deny—precisely what this discovery does to the solitary-artist understanding.

The other choices either strengthen that view (entrenching, substantiating) or describe something unrelated (prefiguring).

That is the correct answer.
